## Summary

Reviewed the AI-REVIEW lifecycle changes again after the latest fixes. Tests and typecheck pass:

- `npm test -- .pi/extensions/issue-agent/index.test.ts`
- `npm run typecheck`

The implementation is improving, but I still found one blocking lifecycle bug and a couple of major reliability gaps that are likely to show up in real issue-agent runs.

## Strengths

- `PR_PENDING` is a better issue-side state now that PR labels are authoritative.

- The mocked integration-style test verifies the important PR creation / PR labelling / issue state transition path.
- `createPullRequest()` now repairs `apiUrl` to an i

## Summary

Reviewed the latest AI-REVIEW lifecycle implementation and re-ran verification:

- `npm test -- .pi/extensions/issue-agent/index.test.ts` ✅
- `npm run typecheck` ✅

The no-change execution issue is fixed, and the code is closer. I still found one blocker around `/review` ordering that can cause explicit review requests to be ignored, plus a major API-safety gap around PR issue endpoints.

## Strengths

- `commitPushPr()` now returns structured `{ createdPr, message }`, which fixes the previous `PR_PENDING` without PR bug.
- No-change executions now move to `WAITING_FOR_REVIEW`.
- `owner:branch` fallback head labels are normalized to plain branch refs.

## Summary

Reviewed the latest issue-agent AI-REVIEW implementation and re-ran:

- `npm test -- .pi/extensions/issue-agent/index.test.ts` ✅
- `npm run typecheck` ✅

The recent fixes are good, but I found one blocker that can cause repeated `/review` loops.

## Strengths

- `listPullRequests()` now repairs missing PR issue URLs even when PR labels are already present.
- `/review` ordering no longer mixes timestamp milliseconds with array indices.
- Local review-cycle labels are updated after mutation.
- The no-change execution path is now handled correctly.
- Tests now cover more realistic PR discovery and `/review` fallback behavior.

## Summary

Reviewed the latest AI-REVIEW lifecycle changes again and verified:

- `npm test -- .pi/extensions/issue-agent/index.test.ts` ✅
- `npm run typecheck` ✅

The previously identified blockers are addressed. I don’t see any remaining must-fix issues in this pass.

## Strengths

- `/review` ordering now uses a consistent strategy with index tie-breaking, preventing same-timestamp replay loops.
- Partial PR-creation success is handled safely: if PR labelling fails after PR creation, the originating issue is moved to `PR_PENDING` to prevent duplicate execution.
- No-change execution path correctly avoids `PR_PENDING`.
